name: I'm on a grassy plain
hints: A grassy plain south of the rocky strand. There may be something buried here.
DIG with the shovel to find buried treasure or items beneath the grass.
DIG with the shovel to unearth a hidden item. Go NORTH to return to the rocky strand with the staircase.
notes: Grassy plain south of the rocky strand. Digging with the shovel reveals a buried item. North returns to the rocky strand (room 19).
